title: April 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 18''' is the 108th day of the year (109th in leap years). There are 257 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Clive Revill]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Howard Roffman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Benedict Taylor]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Conan O'Brien]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[David Tennant]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Cavan Scott]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Edgar Wright]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 60|''Star Wars Weekly'' 60]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[Race for Survival]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*1983 – [[Disney Channel]] is launched.
*1983 – ''[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|The Empire Strikes Back:]]'' "[[The Clash of Lightsabers]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 44|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 44]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 52]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Peter Dennis]] dies.
*[[2011]] – [http://www.starwars.com/vault/books/whatsnew_apr18/index.html ''Don't Wake the Zillo Beast''] published.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: Battles for the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2011 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secrets of the Force]]'' published.
*2011 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Boba Fett: Jedi Hunter]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Darth Vader and Son]]'' published.
*2012 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 3|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 3]] published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Star Wars Expert Guide]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Poe Dameron 26|''Poe Dameron'' 26]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 9|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 9]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Celebration Japan (2025)]] begins.
*2025 – [[Beyond Victory 1|''Beyond Victory'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
